overview: LAGTASTIC LEGENDS is a premium all-in-one browser-based media and document utility app with client-side audio/video conversion, GIF making, PDF tools, secure vault, and file management.
features: Audio and video converter with extract, format change, compress, and mute modes
GIF Maker from video clips or photo sequences
Ringtone Maker with interactive waveform editor and fade effects
ID3 Tag Editor for MP3 and FLAC metadata including cover art
Audio and video merger and splitter
PDF tools: image to PDF, text to PDF, merge, password lock, and scan to PDF
PIN-protected Secure Vault for private files
Smart File Manager to view, rename, share, and delete generated files
Premium deep navy and electric cyan branding with spring-physics animations
